questionHtml: Suggest one advantage of using the urine concentration of cotinine rather than NNAL-Gluc to give a measure of the amount of tobacco smoke inhaled by a person.
markschemeHtml:
higher «concentrations» so easier to measure/identify/find
OR
wider spread/greater range «of values/concentrations»
OR
units are larger/nmol rather than pmol ✔

meta.title: Suggest one advantage of using the urine concentration of cotinine rather than NNAL-Gluc to give a measure of the amount of tobacco smoke inhaled by a person.
